text.title: django-selectors Output Contract
text.summary: Output is Python source code (selector functions). The validator parses each function and checks the schema below: signature is kwarg-only, return type is QuerySet[X] or X, no write operations, lives in `selectors.py`.

section.title: JSON Schema (per-function metadata extracted by the validator)

example.note: Valid: kwarg-only, return types QuerySet[Order] / Order, writes_db=False, lives in selectors.py.
Invalid: positional args, list return, swallowed DoesNotExist, write inside selectors module.
